Switched from field player to goalkeeper at 15 and never looked back—building his own awesome legacy!
Fan of Peaky Blinders and Rally Coffee in Omaha—what a cool mix of gritty drama and caffeine vibes.

Left-footed wizard traded for a historic $2.1M—the first cash-for-player deal for an MLS Homegrown talent—now locked in with Dynamo through 2028![1][3]
Olympic standout, assisting in the Group Stage finale for the U.S. Men's Soccer Team en route to the Quarterfinals in Paris![3]
